data.description:
Run-state on rebar's only durable surface (append-only events).

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] New WORKFLOW_RUN/WORKFLOW_STEP types in KNOWN_EVENT_TYPES + EVENT_TYPES (+ error list).
- [ ] Per-key LWW processor writing into keyed maps (workflow_runs[run_id], workflow_steps[(run_id,step_id)]) -- NOT whole-field replace.
- [ ] Compaction preserve-filter; compiled into ticket state; converges by HLC+UUID.
Files: src/rebar/reducer/_processors.py, src/rebar/reducer/_version.py, src/rebar/_store/event_append.py
data.title: WS-C1: WORKFLOW_RUN/WORKFLOW_STEP event types + per-key LWW processors
